known_drifts.description: Runtime evidence from the 2026-03-29 cutover confirms DEV no longer runs `athanor-governor.service` on :8760, the live listener is gone, and canonical task ownership is served only through the agent server.

subsystems.title: Health and model inventory
notes: Covers health, agent registry, and model catalog reads consumed by the operator product.

subsystems.title: Chat completions
notes: Interactive chat and agent conversation surface.

subsystems.title: History and outputs
notes: Operator-visible activity, outputs, and digest history.

subsystems.title: Preferences and memory
notes: Preferences, learned taste, and operator memory surfaces.

subsystems.title: Routing and context
notes: Context preview, routing classification, cache, and circuit state.

subsystems.title: Service and operator status
notes: Status, home summary, operator audit stream, and system posture surfaces.

subsystems.title: Runtime guard and bounded remediation
notes: Standalone FOUNDRY watchdog live canary bundle with packet-backed rollout and bounded remediation controls.
Restart authority is live for non-protected services, while protected-service exclusions and operator-envelope requirements remain fail-closed.

subsystems.title: Goals, workplan, and projects
notes: Work steering, planning, and project execution control.

subsystems.title: Model governance and proving ground
notes: Promotion, retirement, and proving-ground controls for model roles.

subsystems.title: Notifications, trust, and escalation
notes: Notification review, trust, and operator approval posture.

subsystems.title: Patterns, learning, and improvement
notes: Metrics, diagnoses, patterns, and improvement surfaces.

subsystems.title: Skills, research jobs, and consolidation
notes: Skill execution, research jobs, workflows, and consolidation tools.

subsystems.title: Subscription control layer
notes: Provider policy, leases, and handoff/execution control.

subsystems.title: Task engine and governor posture
notes: Durable task lifecycle and canonical stats belong to the task engine.
Governor surfaces own posture and emergency controls through canonical agent-server routes.
The retired standalone governor facade and its implementation-authority shim are gone; any future :8760 evidence is rollback-only drift.

subsystems.title: Workspace and competition state
notes: Shared workspace, conventions, events, and agent workbench state.
